title: motif and mutter bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
motif
[2.3.4-24]
- Add support for _NET_WORKAREA and _GTK_WORKAREAS
  Resolves: RHEL-97048

mutter
[3.32.2-74]
- Backport implementation for _GTK_WORKAREAS_D# X11 property
  Related: RHEL-87743
full_text:
motif
[2.3.4-24]
- Add support for _NET_WORKAREA and _GTK_WORKAREAS
  Resolves: RHEL-97048

mutter
[3.32.2-74]
- Backport implementation for _GTK_WORKAREAS_D# X11 property
  Related: RHEL-87743
